<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
			"type": "string",
			"default": "Page name",
			"description": "This is auto-generated with the page's name."
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
			"required": true,
			"description": "The image is supplied as a File. Do not upload from unofficial sources."
		},
		"id": {
			"label": "ID",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true,
			"example": "doggy_charm",
			"description": "In-game ID"
		},
		"stackable": {
			"label": "Stackable?",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "Max Stack number",
			"example": "64, 1,...",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"type": {
			"label": "Type",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true,
			"example": "Block",
			"description": "Blocks, Throwables, Treats, Utilities, Artifacts, Combat, Food, Customization, Discs, Creative Exclusive, Legacy/Removed.\nPick one out of the above."
		},
		"Subtype": {
			"type": "string"
		},
		"Description": {
			"label": "Description",
			"description": "In-game description",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"Properties": {
			"description": "When using item this will gives you:...",
			"example": "restore hunger? heal you?",
			"type": "content"
		}
	},
	"description": "This is an infobox template for items",
	"format": "block",
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
		"id",
		"type",
		"Subtype",
		"Properties",
		"stackable",
		"Description"
	]
}
</templatedata>
<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates]]</includeonly><noinclude>[[Category:Template documentation]]</noinclude>
